title: Trebor Uarrac
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Noncanon|legends=1}}
'''Trebor Uarrac''' was a staff writer for ''[[Galactic Gossip]]''.

==Behind the scenes==
"Trebor Uarrac" is an anagram of [[Bob Carrau|Robert Carrau]], author of the [[Canon|non-canonical]] book ''[[Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas]]''.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-11-XX -->''[[Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas]]''
